headline: Henry Schein to Webcast First Quarter 2026 Conference Call on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 8:00 A.M. ET
summary: MELVILLE, N.Y., April 21, 2026--Henry Schein, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSIC), the world’s largest provider of healthcare solutions to office-based dental and medical practitioners, announced today that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before the stock market opens on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, and will provide a live webcast of its earnings conference call on the same day beginning at 8:00 a.m. Eastern time. Speakers on the call will include Frederick M. Lowery, Chief Executive Officer a
